Container.Name: curatorx
Container.Overview: Chat-first Plex collection curator (CA profile). Keep port 8788 on your LAN — do not WAN-expose the control plane without an authenticated reverse proxy.
Container.Description:
CuratorX helps you curate your movie and TV collection through conversation.
**Security (CA)** - Bind to a trusted LAN or put CuratorX behind an authenticated reverse proxy. - Do **not** port-forward bare `:8788` to the internet. - Optional multi-user: set `CURATORX_SESSION_SECRET` (or accept auto-generated secret under Config). - Plex webhooks require `CURATORX_WEBHOOK_SECRET`. - Optional MCP HTTP: set `CURATORX_MCP_API_KEY` (privacy) and/or `CURATORX_MCP_FULL_API_KEY` (full; must differ) to enable `/mcp`. Or generate keys in Admin → Advanced.
**First run** 1. Open the Web UI at port **8788**. 2. Complete setup in **Settings** (`/config`). 3. Run **Sync library**. 4. Start chatting.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Container timezone for preferred library sync hour

Config.Name: CURATORX_SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Strong secret for multi-user session cookies (auto-generated under Config if unset)

Config.Name: CURATORX_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Config.Description: Required for Plex webhook auth header X-CuratorX-Webhook-Secret

Config.Name: CURATORX_MCP_API_KEY
Config.Description: Privacy MCP key for HTTP /mcp (public schema, read-only). Or generate in Admin → Advanced.

Config.Name: CURATORX_MCP_FULL_API_KEY
Config.Description: Full MCP key for trusted in-stack /mcp (must differ from privacy key). Or generate in Admin → Advanced.
